# Linear Models

Now we move the situation where we have a

- [Repsonse/Output/Dependent Variable]{.alert} $Y$

- [Explained/Predicted]{.alert} by a vector of [Predictors/Explanatory Variables/Inputs/Indpendent Variables]{.alert} $\vx$, where the $x_j$ may be functions of other variables or each other

Types of linear models

- $Y = \vx^\top \vbeta + \varepsilon$
